summary: Frontend testing of 3 new pages (Admin Email Stats, Admin Analytics Insights, User Rewards). Fixed 2 build-breaking regressions during testing (duplicate import + missing toast import). Two of three pages now fully functional. Third page (/rewards) is itself functional, but the new rewards-cta button on /referral is hidden because the existing /api/referral/me endpoint returns 500 (MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug).

critical.issue: Returns 500. Backend log: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')] from fastapi/encoders.py. The endpoint is leaking raw MongoDB ObjectId (likely in recent_referrals or nested user docs) into the JSON response. This causes ReferralPage to render the 'Erreur de chargement' fallback (when !data), so the new rewards-cta button is never mounted in the DOM. Defined at server.py L1564 get_my_referral_info().

minor.issue: AdminDashboard page shows console error: 'Error loading live settings: AxiosError 500'. Does not block dashboard rendering but should be investigated.

ui_bugs.issue: BUILD-BREAKING SyntaxError: 'Identifier DollarSign has already been declared' at line 9 — duplicate import in lucide-react import block. This was preventing the ENTIRE frontend bundle from compiling, so all 3 new pages (and the rest of the admin app) rendered the webpack overlay instead of content. FIXED by removing the duplicate.
Missing `import { toast } from 'sonner'` despite using toast.error() / toast.success() — caused runtime PAGEERROR 'toast is not defined' on /referral. FIXED by adding the import.

On first visit, the global onboarding splash ('Toute la Polynésie en un seul fil … Suivant / Passer') overlays /rewards and /referral, hiding the page content. The DOM is mounted underneath (all 5 reward-tier-* testids present), but visually the user must click 'Passer' before seeing the page. Likely existing app behaviour, not regression.

integration_issues.issue: rewards-cta button is not rendered because parent component shows 'Erreur de chargement' fallback when /api/referral/me returns 500. Fixing the backend ObjectId serialization will unblock this.

passed_tests: ✅ Admin login (admin@natifenua.pf / NatiFenua2025!) → /admin/dashboard, admin_token saved in localStorage
✅ /admin/email-stats: 4 KPI cards visible (EMAILS ENVOYÉS=1, TAUX D'OUVERTURE=0%, TAUX DE CLIC=0%, TAUX DE REBOND=0%)
✅ /admin/insights: 4 summary cards (UTILISATEURS TOTAUX=37, NOUVEAUX USERS=0, NOUVELLES PUBLICATIONS=3, ARTICLES RSS=110)
✅ /admin/insights: TOP PUBLICATIONS shows 3 posts from Demo Fenua (Bora Bora, Heiva, Moorea) with 3 top-post-N testids
✅ /admin/insights: TOP VENDEURS MARKETPLACE section visible (empty: 'Aucun vendeur actif')
✅ /admin/insights: RÉPARTITION PAR ÎLE shows Tahiti=20, Moorea=2, Bora-Bora=1
✅ /rewards: H1 'Tes Récompenses' renders after dismissing onboarding
✅ /rewards: All 5 reward-tier-* data-testids present and visible (first_referral, ambassadeur, free_boost_7d, vendor_pro_1m, vip_status)
action_items: Fix /api/referral/me to exclude MongoDB _id / serialize ObjectId in recent_referrals before returning (use {'_id': 0} projection or convert to str). This is the only blocker preventing the rewards-cta button from appearing on /referral.
Investigate /api/admin/settings/live (or equivalent) returning 500 on admin dashboard load.
Consider not showing the onboarding splash for the demo user, or auto-dismissing it on subsequent visits (currently it blocks /rewards and /referral on first visit).
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: AdminDashboardPage.js had a duplicate lucide-react import (DollarSign listed twice on lines 8 and 9) which broke the ENTIRE webpack bundle. This means E1's pre-handoff manual check missed that the dev server was in a broken-compile state. Recommend running `yarn build` before declaring a feature complete.

ReferralPage.js uses toast.error/toast.success without importing toast — only caught at runtime via PAGEERROR. ESLint warnings exist but not 'toast is not defined' is not flagged since `toast` was implicitly assumed global. Recommend stricter ESLint rule for no-undef.

ReferralPage.js silently swallows the API error in catch{} and only shows a toast. Then the !data branch renders a bare 'Erreur de chargement' string with no retry button — bad UX. Consider showing the page content with empty state instead of a hard error fallback.
AdminEmailStatsPage and AdminAnalyticsInsightsPage useEffect have missing deps (load, navigate) — ESLint warning. Use useCallback or include deps.

success_rate.frontend: 5 out of 6 user-visible criteria pass. /admin/email-stats=100%, /admin/insights=100%, /rewards page itself=100%, but the /referral → /rewards navigation entry-point is blocked by a backend 500.

seed_data_creation: None created. Used existing demo user and admin seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two fixes were applied during this iteration: (1) duplicate DollarSign import in AdminDashboardPage.js, (2) missing toast import in ReferralPage.js. The remaining blocker is BACKEND: /api/referral/me returns 500 with MongoDB ObjectId serialization error. Once main agent fixes the backend endpoint (likely add {'_id': 0} projection or .pop('_id', None) in recent_referrals), re-test by: login as demo@nati-fenua.com / DemoFenua2026!, visit /referral, dismiss onboarding (click 'Passer'), confirm [data-testid='rewards-cta'] is visible with text 'Tes paliers de récompenses', click it, verify navigation to /rewards.

rca_of_the_issue.user_visible_symptom: rewards-cta button missing on /referral; previously screenshot showed '0 reward tiers + admin-email-refresh MISSING'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_1_build_breaker: AdminDashboardPage.js had `DollarSign` imported twice from lucide-react (lines 8 and 9). Babel parser refused to compile → webpack served the dev overlay → no React routes mounted → every page testid was MISSING. Fixed by removing the duplicate identifier.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_2_referral: ReferralPage.js called toast.error/toast.success but never imported toast — runtime error broke the component before reaching the rewards-cta JSX. Fixed by adding `import { toast } from 'sonner'`.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_3_remaining: Even after fix #2, /api/referral/me returns HTTP 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId leaking through FastAPI's jsonable_encoder (server.py L1564). data stays null → component renders 'Erreur de chargement' branch → rewards-cta is not in the DOM. Must be fixed in backend.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation_steps: 1) Sanitize recent_referrals to drop _id field. 2) Make the !data branch on ReferralPage still render the rewards-cta button (it doesn't depend on data) so partial failures don't hide the CTA. 3) Add a regression test that asserts /api/referral/me returns 200 with JSON-serializable body.
